query:
SELECT m.matchScore, m.matchReason, p.name, p.sector, p.value, p.capexGrade, p.priority
FROM collateralProjectMatches m 
JOIN projects p ON m.projectId = p.id
WHERE m.collateralId = 1 AND m.matchScore >= 60
ORDER BY m.matchScore DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT m.matchScore, m.matchReason, p.name, p.sector, p.value, p.capexGrade, p.priority
FROM collateralProjectMatches m 
JOIN projects p ON m.projectId = p.id
WHERE m.collateralId = 1 AND m.matchScore >= 60
ORDER BY m.matchScore DESC
LIMIT 20;
